title: Diagram history management hook with API fetching and version retrieval
purpose: Manages diagram change history by fetching from an API and providing functions to retrieve content at specific timestamps.
module_context: Exports a React hook that manages diagram history state and provides utility functions for fetching history and retrieving versions.

steps.content: Initialize state for history data, loading status, and error messages.
Extract project and session information from the current session.
Define and memoize a function to fetch diagram history from the API.
Define and memoize a function to retrieve diagram content at a specific timestamp.
Trigger the history fetch when the diagram ID changes.
Return the history state and utility functions for external use.
Validate that diagram ID, project, and session are available.
IF validation fails, clear the history and return early.
Set loading state to true and clear any previous error.
Construct URL parameters with project and session information.
Fetch diagram history from the API endpoint.
IF the response indicates no history (404), set history to null.
IF the response is successful, parse and store the history data.
IF the response fails for other reasons, set an error message.
IF a network error occurs, set a network error message.
Reset loading state after the fetch attempt completes.
Validate that diagram ID, project, and session are available.
IF validation fails, return null immediately.
Construct URL parameters with project, session, and timestamp information.
Fetch diagram version from the API endpoint.
IF the response is successful, parse and return the content.
IF the response fails, ignore the error and return null.
